out_of_scope_blockers.detail: make test-unit now reaches apps/api ./mvnw -q verify and fails in AdminCodeStatusControllerIT because PostgreSQL rejects the effective invite status count GROUP BY query.
Playwright-managed Chromium is not installed locally; fresh e2e verification passed with CHROMIUM_EXECUTABLE_PATH pointing to system Google Chrome.
An existing apps/web Next dev server from another session blocked starting a second dev server; fresh e2e verification reused http://127.0.0.1:3404 via WEB_SMOKE_BASE_URL.

notes: No raw evidence paths were read.
No API client/shared package files were edited.
